specific_question: How does MediConn's billing structure vary across different customer segments as of Q4 2024, leading into 2025?
answer: As of Q4 2024, and leading into 2025, individual patients of MediConn Solutions can pay out of pocket ($45 per consultation, $65 for mental health sessions). Corporate wellness program participants have employer-subsidized rates with variable co-pays ($10-$25), and some services are partially covered by private insurance that requires claims submission.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
